description: The most powerful MCP Slack Server with no permission requirements, Apps support, GovSlack, DMs, Group DMs and smart history fetch logic.

findings.title: Supply Chain CVE: GO-2026-4559 in golang.org/x/net@0.50.0
findings.recommendation: Upgrade golang.org/x/net to a version that resolves GO-2026-4559. Check https://osv.dev/vulnerability/GO-2026-4559 for patched versions. Enable Dependabot or OSV-Scanner in CI to catch future CVEs automatically.
